flows.name: ENTRY / WELCOME
flows.message:
👋 Welcome to Rumeds
Designed for doctors who don't get to slow down.

🎁 Earn rewards on every referral

Reply with:
1️⃣ Get my referral code
2️⃣ Explore scrubs
3️⃣ Track my rewards

flows.name: REFERRAL CODE GENERATION
flows.message:
🔐 Your Rumeds Referral Code:
DR{{name}}{{last3digits}}

Share this with fellow doctors 👇

✅ They get ₹500 OFF
✅ You get ₹500 credit

🎯 3 successful referrals = FREE scrub

Tap below to share:
👉 Share on WhatsApp

flows.name: SHARE MESSAGE (AUTO-FILL)
TRACK REWARDS
flows.message:
🩺 Your Rumeds Progress

Referrals: {{referral_count}} / 3
Rewards Earned: ₹{{wallet_amount}}

🎁 3 referrals unlock your FREE scrub

You're closer than you think 👀

👉 Type 1 to share your code again

flows.name: AFTER SUCCESSFUL REFERRAL
flows.message:
🎉 Success!

Your referral just placed an order 🙌

₹500 has been added to your wallet 💰

🩺 Progress: {{referral_count}} / 3

Keep going — your FREE scrub is close.

flows.name: FREE SCRUB UNLOCK
flows.message:
🏆 You did it!

You've unlocked your FREE Rumeds Scrub 🎁

Use this code at checkout:
FREESCRUB{{user_id}}

Keep referring to unlock more rewards 👇

👉 Type 1 to continue sharing
flows.shopify_action: Create discount code FREESCRUB{{user_id}} for 100% off one scrub

flows.name: RE-ENGAGEMENT
flows.message:
Long shift? We get it.

You're just {{remaining}} referral away from a FREE scrub 👀

Don't miss it — share your code now:
👉 Type 1

flows.name: EXPLORE SCRUBS
flows.message:
👕 Explore Rumeds Scrubs

✔️ Precision Stretch
✔️ Breathable Fabric
✔️ Wrinkle Resistant

Built for long duty hours.

👉 Shop now: {{website_link}}/collections/all
👉 Or type 1 to earn rewards

whatsapp_setup.note: For native WhatsApp Business flows, replicate these triggers in Meta Business Suite or connect Shopify order webhooks to Flow 5.
